subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the signs of God! Though there be impairment in the physical ear and deficiency in the outward hearing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله اگر در سامعه جسم خللی عارض و در اذن غیر واعیه فتوری حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @the ephemeral and the eternal
